title: Get all Asset Groups
content:
Use this endpoint to get all Asset Groups in your Business Center. You need to be an Admin user of the Business Center. # Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/asset_group/list/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type{Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID. | |filtering | object | Filtering conditions. | #|keyword | string | Keyword to filter by. Currently you can only use exact matching by specifying `asset_group_name` or `asset_group_id` here. | |page | number | Page number. Default value: 1. | |page_size | number | Page size. Default value: 10.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/catalog/overview/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&catalog_id={{catalog_id}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' (/code) ``` # Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned Data. | #| asset_groups | object[] | Asset Group information.| ##| asset_group_id | string | Asset Group ID.| ##| asset_group_name | string | Asset Group name. | #|page_info|object| Pagination information.| ##|page|number| Current page number. Default value:1.| ##|page_size| number | Page size. Default value: 10.| ##|total_number| number | Total number of results. | ##|total_page| number | Total pages of results.| ``` ## Example ```xcodeblock (code) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "2022110908243201025107911603044DD2", "data": { "page_info": { "total_page": 1, "page_size": 10, "total_number": 1, "page": 1 }, "asset_groups": [ { "asset_group_id": "7161375800388747266", "asset_group_name": "测试asset group5" } ] } } (/code) ```
